scripts.build: npm run data:public && npm run sitemap && node scripts/build-pages.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist --d1 DB=chemvault
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name chemvault-zh
scripts.d1:seed: npm run seed:build && wrangler d1 execute chemvault --file=seed.sql
